title: iochroma smithianum
intro: Iochroma smithianum, also known as the Purple Flowering Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, colds, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Iochroma smithianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves, flowers, and roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
